clientTypescript.command: Push-Location client; npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; Pop-Location

playwright.command: $env:VITE_PORT=52828; Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/blog-cms-modules-mock-states.spec.ts e2e/blog-cms-modules-crud.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop --workers=1 --reporter=line; Pop-Location

repairsApplied: BlogCmsModulesPage default viewer role set to tenant-admin so the established FLOW-28 CRUD and default mock-state route render the module console; ?role= overrides remain available for role matrix captures.
runNotes: An initial combined Playwright run hit cold Vite/proxy timeouts in CRUD cells. A CRUD-only rerun passed 4/4, then the full warmed desktop suite passed 12/12.
Temporary CRUD records left by the timed-out run were deleted, and the final desktop suite reran from a clean data state.
